<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/sco_peerList"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



**`sco_peerList`** - Returns the collected peer scoring information

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["sco_peerList"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":0,"maxItems":0,"items":{}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"sco_peerList","params":[],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"title":"peersScoring","type":"array","description":"Array of scoring for every connected peer, or an empty array if no peers.","items":{"title":"peer scoring","type":"object","description":"Object defining peer scoring","properties":{"successfulHandshakes":{"title":"integer dec","type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9]+$","description":"Decimal representation of the integer"},"failedHandshakes":{"title":"integer dec","type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9]+$","description":"Decimal representation of the integer"},"invalidNetworks":{"title":"integer dec","type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9]+$","description":"Decimal representation of the integer"},"repeatedMessages":{"title":"integer dec","type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9]+$","description":"Decimal representation of the integer"},"validBlocks":{"title":"integer representation of the integer"},"invalidBlocks":{"title":"integer dec","type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9]+$","description":"Decimal representation of the representation of the integer"},"goodReputation":{"title":"goodReputation","type":"boolean"},"punishedUntil":{"title":"integer dec","type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9]+$","description":"Decimal representation of the integer"},"id":{"title":"Node Id","type":"string","description":"Hex representing Node Id"},"type":{"title":"type","type":"string","description":"Either 'node' or 'address' depending on what the system is using to score the peer"}}}}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":[{"successfulHandshakes":1,"failedHandshakes":0,"invalidNetworks":0,"repeatedMessages":1,"validBlocks":0,"validTransactions":0,"invalidBlocks":0,"invalidTransactions":0,"invalidMessages":0,"timeoutMessages":0,"unexpectedMessages":0,"invalidHeader":0,"score":0,"punishments":0,"goodReputation":true,"punishedUntil":0,"id":"b8f94fad1160652ddbadae837ce544e4d47b53c2cdcf7a397e3426465ce649c5056c9acf36cf8d869176b58ed7eefe2257334b9be8c895fce3109a40ee06d86e","type":"node"}]}}}}}}
